creator: chris.kruger@coresoftware.net.au
text: Hello. The consultancy Core Digital has long ago changed it's name to Core Software. Could you update the Core Digital section this following. Core Software is based in Perth, Western Australia. We are a consulting company specializing in OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Linux and Windows. We work with firewalls, Virtual Private Networks, Database Servers, Email and Web Servers, Security, WAN/LAN implementations, Multi OS networks. You can contact us here or visit our
